extortion.description: Several hundreds of companies set to release with FINAL WARNINGs upon failure to comply. To all affected companies who will be or are being contacted by us ("ShinyHunters"), please consider this a preliminary warning before we release your name with FINAL WARNING or a complete data leak. Reply, engage, pay a small price, and prevent a publication. Make the right decision, don't be the next headline. | Updated: 10 Mar 2026 | Warning: NOTICE OF WARNING
